newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player and grenade collision.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted material blending to improve accuracy of footstep sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several gaps reported by players.[/p][/*][/list][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a gap in the wall.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player and grenade collision.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted material blending to improve accuracy of footstep sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several gaps reported by players.[/p][/*][/list][p]Ancient[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a gap in the wall.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]调整了玩家和手榴弹的碰撞。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了材质混合以提高脚步声的准确性。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了由玩家。[/p][/*][/list][p]古代[/p][list][*][p]修复了墙上的一个缺口。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ SPECTATING ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of post-processing glitch when switching spectator targets on maps with different post-processing volumes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of stuck x-ray silhouettes when switching spectator targets.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed spectator damage overlay effect.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit (default value "2") to apply ladder inaccuracy to players boosted by a stack of this many or more players.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to AWP draw to idle animation transition.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved consistency of grenade jump throws and the accuracy of the jump throw preview camera.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted model for window covers to show collision / decals when shot.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to player clipping and grenade clipping around windows, window covers, and vent entrance.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the activator for OnPlayerUse to always be the player[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the caller for OnPlayerUse to always be the used entity[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the value of CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a potential crash in exception handling[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ SPECTATING ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case of post-processing glitch when switching spectator targets on maps with different post-processing volumes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of stuck x-ray silhouettes when switching spectator targets.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed spectator damage overlay effect.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit (default value "2") to apply ladder inaccuracy to players boosted by a stack of this many or more players.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to AWP draw to idle animation transition.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved consistency of grenade jump throws and the accuracy of the jump throw preview camera.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted model for window covers to show collision / decals when shot.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjustments to player clipping and grenade clipping around windows, window covers, and vent entrance.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the activator for OnPlayerUse to always be the player[/p][/*][*][p]Changed the caller for OnPlayerUse to always be the used entity[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed the value of CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a potential crash in exception handling[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 观看][/p][list][*][p]修复了在具有不同后处理体积的地图上切换观众目标时出现后处理故障的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了切换观众目标时 X 射线轮廓卡住的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了观众伤害叠加效果。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit（默认值“2”），以将梯子不准确度应用于由这么多或更多玩家叠加的玩家。[/p][/*][*][p]调整 AWP 绘制到空闲动画过渡。[/p][/*][*][p]改进了手榴弹跳投的一致性和跳投预览相机的准确性。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]调整了窗盖的模型，以在以下情况下显示碰撞/贴花[/p][/*][*][p]调整了窗户、窗盖和通风口周围的玩家剪裁和手榴弹剪裁。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 地图脚本][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Instance.RegisterCheatCommand[/p][/*][*][p]添加Instance.GetAllPlayerControllers[/p][/*][*][p]添加 Instance.OnBeginRoundRestart[/p][/*][*][p]添加 Instance.SetRoundRemainingTime[/p][/*][*][p]添加 CSPlayerController.AddMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]添加CSPlayerController.GetMoneySpendableNow[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerController.AddMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerController.GetMoneyEarnedForNextRound[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.HasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]添加了CSPlayerPawn.SetHasHelmet[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSPlayerPawn.IsScoped[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.IsSilencerOn[/p][/*][*][p]将 OnPlayerUse 的激活器更改为始终为玩家[/p][/*][*][p]更改了 OnPlayerUse 的调用者始终是使用的实体[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 CSInputs.LOOK_AT_WEAPON 的值[/p][/*][*][p]修复了异常处理中潜在的崩溃[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: daVinci1980
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Added grating to some windows to make them block bullets.[/p][/*][*][p]Tweaks to player and grenade clipping.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to cancel a grenade throw after the throw was started near the end of the pin pull animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Miscellaneous stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ TOOLS ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed bug that prevented the asset in use from being selected when model browser was opened.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug with layered materials with same surface property on all layers. [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]Added roundmvpanthem_02 for all NIGHTMODE II music kits which plays at 1:5 ratio.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Added grating to some windows to make them block bullets.[/p][/*][*][p]Tweaks to player and grenade clipping.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to cancel a grenade throw after the throw was started near the end of the pin pull animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Miscellaneous stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ TOOLS ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed bug that prevented the asset in use from being selected when model browser was opened.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug with layered materials with same surface property on all layers. [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]Added roundmvpanthem_02 for all NIGHTMODE II music kits which plays at 1:5 ratio.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]修复了地图中的各种漏洞[/p][/*][*][p]修复了各种材质的表面类型。[/p][/*][*][p]向某些窗口添加了光栅，使其能够阻挡子弹。[/p][/*][*][p]对玩家和手榴弹进行了调整剪辑。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了在拉针动画接近结束时开始投掷手榴弹后可以取消投掷的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]其他稳定性改进。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ 工具][/p][list][*][p]修复了打开模型浏览器时无法选择正在使用的资源的错误。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了所有图层上具有相同表面属性的分层材质的错误。 [/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]为所有 NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件添加了 roundmvpanthem_02，以 1:5 比例播放。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p]

newsitems.title: NIGHTMODE II Music Kits
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
Today we are releasing six new music kits with NIGHTMODE Records. NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available in the STORE tab, featuring:
[list]
[*] ALRT, DOPAMINE HIT
[*] Altare, Change My Mind
[*] borne, Give It To Me
[*] Pirapus, EVERYNITE
[*] Repiet & Julia Kleijn, On And On
[*] ShockOne, Voices
[/list]Alongside new music kits, we've continued updating Cache and made other miscellaneous fixes. 

Release Notes for today's update can be found [url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]here[/url].
newsitems.contents_en:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
Today we are releasing six new music kits with NIGHTMODE Records. NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available in the STORE tab, featuring:
[list]
[*] ALRT, DOPAMINE HIT
[*] Altare, Change My Mind
[*] borne, Give It To Me
[*] Pirapus, EVERYNITE
[*] Repiet & Julia Kleijn, On And On
[*] ShockOne, Voices
[/list]Alongside new music kits, we've continued updating Cache and made other miscellaneous fixes. 

Release Notes for today's update can be found [url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]here[/url].
newsitems.contents_cn:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6cfbf7066cc7fdedd3fc9cfd3a46a131d195d4ac.png[/img]
今天，我们将与 NIGHTMODE Records 一起发布六款新音乐套件。 NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件现已在 STORE 选项卡中提供，其中包括：
[列表]
[*] 警报，多巴胺发挥作用
[*] 阿尔塔，改变我的想法
[*] 承担，给我
[*] 皮拉帕斯，每夜
[*] Repiet 和 Julia Kleijn，《On And On》
[*] ShockOne、声音
[/list]除了新的音乐包之外，我们还继续更新缓存并进行其他杂项修复。 

今天的更新的发行说明可以在[url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/730/view/702141807556821888]此处[/url]找到。

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: tomd
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map.[/p][/*][*][p]Simplified grenade clipping in various areas.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed sounds and surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Orange wire spool at Sandbags has been exchanged for white wire.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available for purchase in standard and StatTrak versions through the STORE tab.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed progressive refinement rendering Source Film Maker.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]User Viewmodel FOV now correctly networks to remote clients.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player model occlusion bounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed ragdolls missing death velocity when shot in specific body locations.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ground smoothing transitions when leaving the ground and when landing.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where post-processing transitions weren't smooth (e.g. at the end of freeze time).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where map guides for Ancient wouldn't load in the nighttime version[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted score values for various weapons in Deathmatch.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted XP limits in Deathmatch and Arms Race.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Fixed various holes in map.[/p][/*][*][p]Simplified grenade clipping in various areas.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed sounds and surfacetypes for various materials.[/p][/*][*][p]Orange wire spool at Sandbags has been exchanged for white wire.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MUSIC KITS ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II Music Kits are now available for purchase in standard and StatTrak versions through the STORE tab.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed progressive refinement rendering Source Film Maker.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]User Viewmodel FOV now correctly networks to remote clients.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player model occlusion bounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed ragdolls missing death velocity when shot in specific body locations.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to ground smoothing transitions when leaving the ground and when landing.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where post-processing transitions weren't smooth (e.g. at the end of freeze time).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where map guides for Ancient wouldn't load in the nighttime version[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted score values for various weapons in Deathmatch.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted XP limits in Deathmatch and Arms Race.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][列表][*][p]修复了地图中的各种漏洞。[/p][/*][*][p]简化了各个区域的手榴弹剪辑。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了各种材料的声音和表面类型。[/p][/*][*][p]沙袋的橙色线轴已修复交换为白线。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ 音乐套件 ][/p][list][*][p]NIGHTMODE II 音乐套件现在可以通过 STORE 选项卡购买标准版本和 StatTrak 版本。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]修复了渐进细化渲染源影片Maker。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]用户视图模型视野现在可以正确地联网到远程客户端。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了玩家模型遮挡边界。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了布娃娃在特定身体中射击时丢失死亡速度的问题[/p][/*][*][p]对离开地面和着陆时的地面平滑过渡进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了后处理过渡不平滑的情况（例如在冻结时间结束时）。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了古代地图指南在夜间无法加载的情况版本[/p][/*][*][p]调整了死亡竞赛中各种武器的得分值。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了死亡竞赛和军备竞赛中的 XP 限制。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Map-wide clipping fixes and geometry polish.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some spots where bomb would be unreachable when dropped.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dynamic shadows breaking in some spots.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some surface sound types.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed hand popping when counter-strafing with a grenade equipped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Limit aim punch to 90 degrees.[/p][/*][*][p]Added secondary intersection trace for partially-occluded thirdperson weapons.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces join with step-height transitions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue that caused defuse-cables from completely occluded players to also be occluded.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed 'FATAL ERROR: Failed to on-demand compile shader' affecting some older GPUs.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Map-wide clipping fixes and geometry polish.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some spots where bomb would be unreachable when dropped.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dynamic shadows breaking in some spots.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some surface sound types.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed hand popping when counter-strafing with a grenade equipped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Limit aim punch to 90 degrees.[/p][/*][*][p]Added secondary intersection trace for partially-occluded thirdperson weapons.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces join with step-height transitions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue that caused defuse-cables from completely occluded players to also be occluded.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed 'FATAL ERROR: Failed to on-demand compile shader' affecting some older GPUs.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]地图范围内的裁剪修复和几何图形抛光。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了投掷炸弹时无法到达的一些位置。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了某些位置的动态阴影中断问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了一些表面声音类型。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]修复了装备手榴弹进行反扫射时手部弹出的问题。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]将瞄准拳头限制为 90 [/p][/*][*][p]为部分遮挡的第三人称武器添加了辅助交叉轨迹。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了倾斜地面与台阶高度过渡连接的位置处的地面平滑度。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了导致完全遮挡的玩家的引信电缆也被遮挡的问题被遮挡。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了影响某些较旧 GPU 的“致命错误：无法按需编译着色器”。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Bomb explosion radius increased.[/p][/*][*][p]Lighting Adjustments around Vent.[/p][/*][*][p]Disabled player collision on sign and removed lamp by squeaky.[/p][/*][*][p]Reworked e-box on A-site for better visibility.[/p][/*][*][p]Lowered Checkers entrance frame height at B Main.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed AC unit above Sandbags and moved pipes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed lack of footstep sounds on top of crates at A-site.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed hole in world on door in Sun Room.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed wall bangs on A Main wall.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some z-fighting around Garage.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Blocked visibility through corner of Mid Box (Xbox).[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Speculative fix for a case where all audio drops out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where crouch-jumping in confined spaces could cause the player camera to intersect the ceiling.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted particle effect sprite opacity for fully occluded flashbangs.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved smoke lighting consistency.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to dropped pistol magazine velocity.[/p][/*][*][p]Ambient Occlusion adjustment settings in Environment Blend shader restored.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where money was subtracted from the wrong player during bot takeover.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Bomb explosion radius increased.[/p][/*][*][p]Lighting Adjustments around Vent.[/p][/*][*][p]Disabled player collision on sign and removed lamp by squeaky.[/p][/*][*][p]Reworked e-box on A-site for better visibility.[/p][/*][*][p]Lowered Checkers entrance frame height at B Main.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed AC unit above Sandbags and moved pipes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed lack of footstep sounds on top of crates at A-site.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed hole in world on door in Sun Room.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed wall bangs on A Main wall.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some z-fighting around Garage.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Blocked visibility through corner of Mid Box (Xbox).[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Speculative fix for a case where all audio drops out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where crouch-jumping in confined spaces could cause the player camera to intersect the ceiling.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted particle effect sprite opacity for fully occluded flashbangs.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved smoke lighting consistency.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to dropped pistol magazine velocity.[/p][/*][*][p]Ambient Occlusion adjustment settings in Environment Blend shader restored.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where money was subtracted from the wrong player during bot takeover.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]炸弹爆炸半径增加。[/p][/*][*][p]通风口周围的照明调整。[/p][/*][*][p]禁止玩家在标志上发生碰撞，并通过吱吱声移除灯。[/p][/*][*][p]重新设计了 A 站点上的电子箱，以获得更好的效果能见度。[/p][/*][*][p]降低了 B Main 处的 Checkers 入口框架高度。[/p][/*][*][p]移除了沙袋上方的空调装置并移动了管道。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 A 站点板条箱顶部缺少脚步声的问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了阳光下世界中门上的洞房间。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了主墙上的墙壁刘海。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了车库周围的一些深度冲突。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了整个地图上的手榴弹剪裁。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了整个地图上的玩家剪裁地图。[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]通过 Mid Box (Xbox) 的一角阻挡可见性。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]对所有音频丢失的情况进行推测修复out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了在密闭空间中蹲伏跳跃可能导致玩家摄像机与天花板相交的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了粒子效果精灵不透明度以实现完全遮挡flashbangs。[/p][/*][*][p]改进了烟雾照明的一致性。[/p][/*][*][p]对掉落的手枪弹匣速度进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]恢复了环境混合着色器中的环境光遮挡调整设置。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了在机器人过程中从错误的玩家身上扣除金钱的情况接管。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Cache arrives in Counter-Strike 2 while Valve continue working on ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents:
A return of a classic, the popular Cache map has finally returned with the latest Counter-Strike 2 update that's out now. Nice to see more content arrive!

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/
newsitems.title_en: Cache arrives in Counter-Strike 2 while Valve continue working on ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents_en:
A return of a classic, the popular Cache map has finally returned with the latest Counter-Strike 2 update that's out now. Nice to see more content arrive!

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/
newsitems.title_cn: Cache 抵达《反恐精英 2》，而 Valve 仍在继续开发 ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents_cn:
经典回归，广受欢迎的缓存地图终于在《反恐精英 2》最新更新中回归。很高兴看到更多内容到来！

在此处阅读全文： https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/

newsitems.title: The Return Of Cache
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents:
[video webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4" poster="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png" autoplay="true" controls="false"][/video]

Today's update features the return of a classic. Welcome back, Cache!

Cache veterans will feel right at home in familiar locations, while new players can quickly learn the ins and outs of a classic three lane map that rewards strategy and teamplay.

You can find Cache in Casual, Competitive, Deathmatch and Retakes modes (for now). 

Don't forget to clear Forklift, and we'll see you on the server.
newsitems.contents_en:
[video webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4" poster="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png" autoplay="true" controls="false"][/video]

Today's update features the return of a classic. Welcome back, Cache!

Cache veterans will feel right at home in familiar locations, while new players can quickly learn the ins and outs of a classic three lane map that rewards strategy and teamplay.

You can find Cache in Casual, Competitive, Deathmatch and Retakes modes (for now). 

Don't forget to clear Forklift, and we'll see you on the server.
newsitems.contents_cn:
[视频 webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4"海报=“https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png”autoplay=“true”controls=“false”][/video]

今天的更新让经典回归。欢迎回来，卡什！

老玩家会在熟悉的地点感到宾至如归，而新玩家则可以快速了解经典三车道地图的细节，奖励策略和团队合作。

您可以在休闲、竞技、死亡竞赛和重夺模式中找到缓存（目前）。 

别忘了清除叉车，我们服务器上见。

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Added Cache to Competitive, Casual, Deathmatch, and Retakes modes.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Uncovered Mid Box (Xbox) to reveal a previously hidden jump spot. On purpose this time.[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]Enabled collision on tarp on boxes used around CT spawn.[/p][/*][/list][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Talon and Karambit knives are now held correctly while defusing.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Minor mix changes and adjustments.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue where C4 equip sound was not getting interrupted by other equip sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed first-person death sound effect that played in the case of music kit death cue being inaudible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Shader fix for AO while using alpha test causing overly dark and chunky silhouettes, as seen on railings in Mirage.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to hold no weapon by requesting a hand switch after throwing a grenade.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Added Cache to Competitive, Casual, Deathmatch, and Retakes modes.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Uncovered Mid Box (Xbox) to reveal a previously hidden jump spot. On purpose this time.[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]Enabled collision on tarp on boxes used around CT spawn.[/p][/*][/list][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Talon and Karambit knives are now held correctly while defusing.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Minor mix changes and adjustments.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue where C4 equip sound was not getting interrupted by other equip sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed first-person death sound effect that played in the case of music kit death cue being inaudible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Shader fix for AO while using alpha test causing overly dark and chunky silhouettes, as seen on railings in Mirage.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to hold no weapon by requesting a hand switch after throwing a grenade.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]在竞技、休闲、死亡竞赛和重拍模式中添加了缓存。[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]揭开中间盒 (Xbox) 以显示之前隐藏的跳跃点。这次是故意的。[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]在 CT 生成点周围使用的盒子上的防水布上启用了碰撞。[/p][/*][/list][p]要塞[/p][list][*][p]已更新到社区研讨会的最新版本([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]已更新至社区研讨会的最新版本([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型动画进行细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]Talon 和现在，在拆弹时可以正确握住卡拉姆比特刀。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[声音][/p][list][*][p]轻微的混音更改和调整。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 C4 装备声音不会被其他装备声音打断的问题。[/p][/*][*][p]删除了第一人称死亡声音在音乐套件死亡提示听不见的情况下播放的效果。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]使用 alpha 测试时对 AO 进行着色器修复，导致轮廓过于黑暗和粗壮，如 Mirage 中的栏杆上所示。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了通过请求无法持有武器的情况投掷手榴弹后的手动开关。[/p][/*][/list]
